# MenuScrollbarStyle enumeration

Visual style for the vertical scrollbar (GlassMenu panels).

```csharp
public enum MenuScrollbarStyle
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ThumbOnly | `0` | Thin accent thumb, no track, no arrow buttons. The default. |
| ThinTrack | `1` | Faint track + muted thumb, no arrow buttons. |
